case_title: PETER SOLIMENE et al RESPONDENT VS. JOCHEN FREY et al APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: MINUTES FOR APR-14-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL HEARD APR-14-2004 IN DEPT 525. PETER SOLIMENE AND CHRISTINE WALKER, PLTF/RESPONDENTS AND JOCHEN FREY, KAMRAN LOTFI AND LOU COX DEFTS/APPELLANTS PRESENT IN PRO PER. WITNESSES S/E; EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. THE MATTER IS SUBMITTED. JPT: LARRY D. LANGLEY, CLERK: V.MACK, NOT REPORTED.
RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT FREY, JOCHEN LOTFI, KAMRAN COX, LOU AS TO RESPONDENT SOLIMENE, PETER WALKER, CHRISTINE HEARING SET FOR APR-14-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT FREY, JOCHEN LOTFI, KAMRAN COX, LOU RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT SOLIMENE, PETER WALKER, CHRISTINE $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $272.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER
